meta.name: MLQ Meaning in Life Questionnaire
meta.description: The MLQ is a 10-item scale measuring two dimensions of meaning in life: Presence (currently felt meaning) and Search (actively seeking meaning).
meta.author: Steger et al. (2006)
meta.reference: Steger MF, et al. The Meaning in Life Questionnaire: Assessing the presence of and search for meaning in life. Journal of Counseling Psychology. 2006;53(1):80-93.
meta.instruction: Please rate how true each statement is for you.

questions.text: I am looking for something that makes my life feel meaningful
I am always looking to find my life's purpose
My life has a clear sense of purpose
I have a good sense of what makes my life meaningful
I have discovered a satisfying life purpose
I am always searching for something that makes my life feel significant
I am seeking a purpose or mission for my life
My life has no clear purpose
I am searching for meaning in my life

ranges.label: Low Meaning in Life
ranges.description: You currently have relatively low levels of both perceived and sought meaning in life. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Try exploring your personal values and interests
Engage in volunteering or community activities
Share your thoughts and feelings with people important to you
Increase the frequency of positive social activities
Develop a hobby that gives you a sense of accomplishment

ranges.label: Moderate Meaning in Life
ranges.description: You have a moderate sense of meaning and are somewhat engaged in exploring life's purpose. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue exploring what matters to you
Reflect on and document your core values
Set goals that align with your values
Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others

ranges.label: High Meaning in Life
ranges.description: You have a clear understanding of your life's meaning and actively pursue purpose. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Continue living a meaningful lifestyle
Help others discover meaning in their lives
Continue exploring and growing in new areas
Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others

presence.label: Low Presence
presence.description: You currently feel little sense of meaning in your life. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

presence.label: Moderate Presence
presence.description: You have some sense of meaning in your life. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Increase the frequency of positive social activities
Develop a hobby that gives you a sense of accomplishment
Focus on your strengths and existing resources
Set meaningful personal goals
Maintain regular exercise and outdoor activities

presence.label: High Presence
presence.description: You clearly feel that your life is meaningful. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

search.label: Low Search
search.description: You are not actively searching for meaning in life. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

search.label: Moderate Search
search.description: You are moderately exploring the meaning of life. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

search.label: High Search
search.description: You are actively searching for and exploring the meaning of life. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques
Stay in communication with people you trust
If symptoms persist or worsen, consider consulting a professional
Maintain a positive outlook on life
